diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,118 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Single file acting as module entry point
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements pattern-based routing using compiled regular expressions with named parameters and wildcards
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams
+- Simple note: Converts paths to regex patterns, matches by exec, returns handlers with matched params
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Single file acting as module entry point
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements sequential linear path matching with support for named parameters and wildcards
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, checkOptionalParameter
+- Simple note: Linear search through route array, handles :, *, and {pattern} labels with skip logic
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Module exports both runtime and prepared (build-once) router classes
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Dynamic matcher that builds compiled regex at match-time for all added routes
+- Names noticed: HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, METHOD_NAME_ALL, emptyParam, match
+- Simple note: Caches matchers by method, uses static mapping or regexp exec for route matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node class that builds optimized regexp string from path tokens
+- Names noticed: Node, PATH_ERROR, Context, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, compareKey, regExpMetaChars
+- Simple note: Insert path tokens into trie, builds sorted regexp string with named groups for params
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Builds compiled regexp and replacement maps from path patterns
+- Names noticed: Trie, ReplacementMap, Context, Node
+- Simple note: Converts brace-notation params to markers, tokenizes paths, delegates to Node for regexp construction
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-builds composite regexp for optimal match performance
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Build-time compilation of router paths for fast matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router that combines pattern-router for adding routes (build-time compilation)
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PatternRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Two-phase: add uses pattern router, match uses prebuilt matcher
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Single file acting as module entry point
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Fallback dispatcher that tries routers sequentially until one succeeds
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Dynamically delegates to best matching router after initial adds, locks active router
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Single file acting as module entry point
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based routing with pattern matching for named params and wildcards
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, METHOD_NAME_ALL, checkOptionalParameter
+- Simple note: Hierarchical tree structure stores routes by path segments
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node with method/handler storage and pattern matching during search
+- Names noticed: Node, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Simple note: Tree traversal with BFS queue, deduplicates params per handler, sorts by insertion order
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite for all router implementations
+- Names noticed: runTest, getSuiteHierarchy, RunnerTestSuite, Common, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, RegistrationOrder, MultiMatch, page, star, Optional, All, longPrefixStar, IncludingSlashes, CaptureGroups, UnknownMethod
+- Simple note: Test helper that parametrizes router testing with shared test cases
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter only
+- Names noticed: Pattern, runTest, PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Validates PatternRouter handles trailing params and regex escaping
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter only
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Validates LinearRouter rejects unsupported patterns like {pattern}* or complex params
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter only
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Validates RegExpRouter catches ambiguous paths and invalid regex patterns
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Integration tests using SmartRouter as composed router
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Tests router composition and method name detection
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter only, skips common test suite
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Validates TrieRouter matches all shared cases, calls runTest with minimal setup
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Trie node tree structure
+- Names noticed: Node
+- Simple note: Tests insertion, search, wildcard handling, param deduplication, sort order
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts src/router/pattern-router/router.ts src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/i
